prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock 3.0L *C.114* V6 (190-220 hp) with a fully built *C.114* featuring forged Mahle pistons (8.5:1 CR), Carrillo H-beam rods, and a billet crankshaft from JP Performance. Pair with a custom camshaft grind by Schrick (280° duration, 11.5mm lift) and titanium retainers from Ferrea Racing.

Forced Induction: Install a Garrett GT3582R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) with a custom air-to-water intercooler by Bell Intercoolers, plumbed via silicone hoses from Samco Sport. Use a Tial MV-R 44mm wastegate and a 50mm HKS SSQV blow-off valve for boost control (target: 1.2 bar / 17.5 psi).

Fuel & Ignition: Convert to a full sequential fuel injection system with Bosch Motorsport 0280158107 injectors (1,000 cc/min) and a Link G4+ Xtreme ECU. Add a Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump and a custom fuel rail by Radium Engineering. Ignition upgrade includes NGK Iridium IX spark plugs (heat range 8) and a MSD Digital 6AL ignition box with a Blaster SS coil.
estetica: Body: Install a custom widebody kit by Liberty Walk (LB-WORKS Merak-specific design) with carbon fiber fender flares, front splitter, and rear diffuser. Use a custom front bumper with integrated DRLs from LUX Automotive and a rear spoiler by APR Performance (GT-250 model).

Wheels & Tires: Fit OZ Racing Ultraleggera HLT wheels (18x9.5 ET25 front, 18x11 ET35 rear) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (245/40/18 front, 295/35/18 rear). Use custom wheel spacers by H&R (15mm front, 25mm rear) for flush fitment.

Interior: Replace the stock seats with Recaro Pole Position buckets (cloth/Alcantara) and install a custom roll cage by Custom Cages (T45 steel, 6-point design). Add a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel with a quick-release hub and a digital dash by AIM MXS Strada (1.3" display) with integrated data logging.
